infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 07 - 09 June 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 10:00 Friday June 5, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Scuderia Ferrari HP Document 10 Date 04 June 2026 Time 17:23 No / Driver 1

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX
07 - 09 June 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 10:00 Friday June 5, in
relation to the incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Scuderia Ferrari HP
Document 10
Date 04 June 2026
Time 17:23
No / Driver 16 - Charles Leclerc
Reason Alleged breach of Article B10.1.1.a of the FIA F1 Regulations - Late attendance of
the Thursday Press Conference. 
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Derek Warwick Jean-François Calmes
